issues.sample: HYDROGEN VEHICLE NOT RELIABLE IN Orange County, CA. ALSO THE VEHICLE MILAGE IS EXTREMELY POOR, HAVING TO FILL UP ABOUT EVERY 2-3 DAYS. LESS THAN 150 MILES PER TANK EASILY. VEHICLE CONSISTENTLY HAS TO BE TOWED WHEN STATIONS ARE DOWN. HYDROGEN STATIONS WERE DOWN MOST OF APRIL, TOYO

CAR LOSS ACCELERATION TWICE DURING DRIVING.     ACCELERATION ISSUE WAS REPORTED TO TOYOTA IN OCT 2018  ACCELERATION ISSUE WAS REPORTED TO TOYOTA IN MAR 2019    I HAVE EMAIL DOCUMENTATION THAT THE CAR WAS TAKEN TO LONGO TOYOTA TO REVIEW, TOYOTA MOTOR NORTH AMERICA (TMNA) WAS ASKED

narrative.headline: What 2016 Toyota Mirai owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (50% of reports).
